message:
fix(sql): remove fragile WASM fast path and fix columnar rowCount bug

- Remove fragile WASM fast path for aggregations that had too many conditions
  and silently failed, causing 0 rows to be returned
- Fix selectColumnar rowCount calculation to use any column with data,
  not just the first column which might be empty after flush
- Remove duplicate DuckDB benchmark tests (use run-comparison-benchmark.spec.js)
- Add parquet fixtures and update integration test HTTP URL
